assertions.text: plan.md file exists and is non-trivial (>500 chars)
Summary documents defaults taken for all 4 Q&A questions (KPI, Baseline, Knob whitelist, Budget)
Plan has all 6 sections per SKILL.md template: Context, Direction, Hypothesis priority (or noted as skipped), Traps, Recommended command, Post-run checklist
Recommended command is a single copy-pasteable /bal-converge line with no placeholders or pseudocode
Plan references actual knob ids from .claude/bal-apply.json (not invented)
Recommended command uses only bal-converge-supported args (kpi, N, max_iter, timeout, max_wall) — no fake args like baseline= or whitelist=
Plan does NOT claim /bal-converge was executed
